scene_1.visual_plan: Begin with a medium shot of the model seated comfortably in a softly lit, casual indoor environment, using a tripod for steady framing. The camera slowly dollies in as the model starts speaking, maintaining a shallow depth of field focusing on the model’s face to create intimacy. About halfway through, cut to a close-up of the model’s hands holding and gently squeezing the product, showcasing its softness and texture, with natural handheld camera motion to enhance realism. Return to the medium shot with the product now visible near the model’s face, held in the right hand, as they conclude their story with a warm expression.
scene_1.dialogue: 『どうやってこの超柔らかい砂漠の形のスクイッシュトイを偶然見つけたかというと、それが私のストレス対策にとって完全に画期的なものでした。気を散らさないフィジェットアイテムが欲しかったんです。』
